headline: United Airlines CEO Scott Kirby signals a major business shift
summary: There's an old saying in business: never waste a crisis. United Airlines CEO Scott Kirby, it seems, has that line memorized. The 95-year-old and Chicago-based United Airlines (UAL) chief executive was in Rio de Janeiro over the weekend, which ended on June 7, speaking on the sidelines of the ...

headline: A $100 Billion Fuel-Price Shock Is Pushing Airlines Back Into Crisis Mode
summary: Airlines face a fuel‑price shock and aging fleets that threaten post‑pandemic recovery, forcing route cuts and raising costs as industry profits plunge and margins tighten across 2026.
